reason: Decider patched detail_evidence: (1) replaced "180° geomagnetic symmetry as predicted by dome geometry" with dual-reading frame clarifying dome only said "Geometric Symmetry CONFIRMED" with no angle; (2) fixed agonic line position from ~80°W to ~95-100°W per WMM 2025; (3) anchored tolerance comparison to WIN-029 5.3% figure. Check whether any analyst expansion or prior analysis assumed the 180° attribution was verbatim from dome source.

Decider patched: (1) Gaia DR3 URL fixed from EDR3 paper to DR3 release paper DOI; (2) Polaris luminosity updated from ~1,260 to ~2,400 L☉ (consistent with 433 ly and V-band magnitude). Verify any downstream calculations or cross-WIN comparisons still hold.

Decider patched: (1) TLDR rewritten to lead with dome over-prediction punchline (90-270 W/m² vs 0.34 W/m²); (2) range derivation clarified with sun-orbit radius bounds; (3) direction non-discrimination sentence added to verdict; (4) inverse-square corrected to inverse-cube projected-flux. ISS-1917 (advocate preempt paragraph in detail_evidence) remains assigned-analyst — still outstanding.
